results.title: GitHub - openclaw/clawhub: Skill Directory for OpenClaw · GitHub
results.description: ClawHub · Vision · Docs · Contributing · Discord · Browse skills + render their SKILL.md. Publish new skill versions with changelogs + tags (including latest).

results.title: Top 10 OpenClaw Skills you can't afford to miss in 2026 | Composio
results.description: Clawdbot already has some self-improvement capability; this skill takes it to the next level. It dynamically tracks interactions, logging errors, active learnings, and feature requests into a dedicated memory folder. This gives the bot a structured layer of intelligence that makes it more accurate over time, not just responsive. Can be dowloaded from clawdhub at Self-Improving-Agent - ClawHub

results.title: 15 Best OpenClaw Skills in 2026: Ranked and Tested | Blink Blog
results.description: Via ClawHub UI: Open your OpenClaw dashboard, navigate to ClawHub, search for the skill, and click Install. ... Via Blink Claw: Open the Skills panel in your Blink Claw dashboard, search the registry, and install with one click. Your agent picks up the new skill immediately — no restart required.

results.title: clawhub | Skills Marketplace
results.description: Main advantages are faster repeat installs via local cache, smaller transfers through compression, deterministic version control, and robust scripting automation for reproducible skill management.
